pi_items.metadata_value: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
pi_items.verified_value: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
pi_items.source: Task description and Kubernetes administration workflow
setup_task.sh explicitly creates and deploys to the 'catalog' namespace; verifier.py checks it
setup_task.sh creates this PVC in the initial manifest; verifier.py checks that it is removed
verifier.py explicitly checks for a new PVC named 'catalog-data-v2'
setup_task.sh sets this as the container mountPath; export_result.sh uses it for data hashing
verifier.py checks if score >= 80 to determine pass/fail status

privileged_info_summary: Verified the task operates on a Kubernetes cluster, requiring data migration from a legacy PVC 'catalog-data-legacy' to a new PVC 'catalog-data-v2' in the 'catalog' namespace. The data is mounted at '/usr/share/nginx/html/data' and consists of the real public Chinook SQLite sample database downloaded from GitHub alongside a synthetically generated metadata file to prevent gaming. The verifier assigns a passing score at an 80-point threshold.
